question: Chapters
feedback: The text does not mention any chapters or sections of the thesis. It focuses entirely on the problem statement and the proposed solution.

question: Description
feedback: The text describes the problem and the objective of the prototype, but it does not provide a description of the contents of the thesis chapters.

question: Structure
feedback: The general structure of the thesis is not visible. The text is repetitive (the first paragraph and second paragraph repeat almost the same information) and lacks an overview of how the research is organized.
